task_scores.task_title: Phase 1 — Backend mock data layer (mock_welders, generate_frames_for_arc, generate_session_for_welder)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If frame params (angle/amps/thermal) produce scores outside ±15 of target, extract_features→score_session yields wrong bands and badges show incorrect On track/Needs attention.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Prototype validation (Step 1.4) with explicit pass bands—run earlier to fail fast before Phase 2.
task_scores.reasoning: Core dependency for all other phases; unblocks demo data and scoring.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 2 — Seed & wipe (~45 sessions, derive IDs from WELDER_ARCHETYPES, seed_demo_data alignment)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If session ID derivation diverges between seed and wipe, wipe misses sessions and orphan mock data breaks demo reset.
task_scores.reasoning: Single source of truth for IDs is correct; enables dashboard and report.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 3 — Dashboard (10 welder cards, latest/second score fetch, On track/Needs attention badges)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If 20 fetchScore calls block or timeout, dashboard hangs; if byWelder grouping is wrong, badges appear on wrong welders.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Add batch GET /api/scores?ids=... to reduce round-trips; plan marks this OOS so current approach is acceptable.
task_scores.reasoning: Primary demo surface; 10 cards and badges are the main outcome for supervisor.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 4 — Welder report (fetched historical scores, sess_expert-benchmark_005 baseline, trend chart)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If expert-benchmark not seeded before demo, fetchSession 404 breaks comparison; if Promise.all order mismatches historicalSessionIds, chart and AI feedback get wrong scores.
task_scores.reasoning: Drill-down with trend chart and expert comparison completes the demo story.

task_scores.task_title: Phase 5 — Tests (test_mock_welders.py, test_dev_routes updates for ~45 sessions)
task_scores.ships_wrong_risk: If score range assertions are too tight (±15), test_arc_scores_in_reasonable_range flakes when extract_features/thresholds change.
task_scores.higher_leverage_alternative: Run tests after Phase 2 only; defer volatile repro test until seed route is stable.
task_scores.reasoning: Essential for correctness per project rules but not directly visible to stakeholder.

critical_issues: Step 1.2: Frame params in generate_frames_for_arc may not produce scores in expected bands; prototype (Step 1.4) has soft pass criteria and no automated gate.
Step 3.2: 20 sequential fetchScore calls on dashboard; no timeout or retry handling; slow network could block or hang the page.
WELDER_ARCHETYPES and sessionCount duplicated in seagull/page.tsx and welder/[id]/page.tsx — drift risk if archetypes change.
minor_issues: random.seed(42) in seed route but prototype_arc_scoring.py may not seed; volatile validation could differ between prototype and seed runs.
test_dev_routes expects >=40 sessions; exact count (45) varies with archetype sessions sum—brittle if archetypes change.
suggestions: Add explicit prototype pass bands (e.g. fast_learner s0 in 43–73, s4 in 70–98) and fail Step 1.4 if out of band.
Document batch scores endpoint as follow-up; add 5s timeout to fetchScore or use AbortController to avoid indefinite hang.
Consider GET /api/dev/welders returning archetypes + sessionCount so frontend uses single source of truth.
dependency_order: Phase 1 before Phase 2 (generate_session_for_welder required). Phase 2 before Phase 3 and 4 (seed data required). Phase 3 and 4 can run in parallel. Phase 5 after Phases 1–4.
premortem_top_risk: Frame generation params produce scores outside expected bands, so declining welders show On track or fast learners show Needs attention, and the demo story fails.
goal_alignment_notes: All phases serve the enterprise demo goal: 10 welders with skill arcs, badges, and drill-down. Phases 1–4 deliver visible outcomes within 48h. Phase 5 supports data integrity per project rules. Plan aligns with acceptance criteria in the issue.
